title: Dazzling Metallic Blue Number 8 Birthday Candle - Perfect Cake Topper for Unforgettable Milestones - 1 Pc
availability_text: Only 6 left in stock (more on the way).
features: STRIKING BLUE METALLIC DESIGN: Our stunning number 8 birthday candle features a vibrant metallic blue finish, ensuring your milestone celebration is truly unforgettable and eye-catching on any cake.
HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: Made of premium wax material, this long-lasting candle ensures a clean and even burn, adding the perfect touch to your special day without any worry of a messy meltdown.

CAPTURE THE MOMENT: Perfect for celebrating momentous occasions like first birthdays, anniversaries, graduations, or a decade of success, our stunning number candle allows you to mark special milestones in a unique and memorable way.

EASY & CONVENIENT: Quickly bring life to your party decorations with our simple-to-use birthday candle, just place it on top of your cake and light it up for an instant wow-factor everyone will adore.

BOOST YOUR EVENT'S AESTHETIC: Take advantage of our elegant and easy-to-use candle by pairing it with matching blue metallic party supplies and decorations and watch your event come to life with a stunning cohesive look.
description: From the manufacturer Metallic Blue Numeral Candles Show your age in elegant fashion with these bright and vibrant candles! These blue metallic coated candles are ideal to add a shine to any Birthday with a blue motif, so make a wish and blow out the candles!
